messages.content: Also had an idea for an update. Could you make it so after you start reading from the Tether app if you decide to read from a hardcopy and then come back to the Tether app you donât have to reread the things on the Tether app that you just did on the hardcopy?
So far everything is working fine!
as long as you have the new update installed as well
so if your phone is in dark mode the app will be in darkmode
it matches your phone theme
Just finished todayâs reading. Seems good to me. How do I change dark mode and such? Is there a settings?
But the new version just got approved a few minutes ago could you check now and see if you see it?
Hey super sorry I actually forgot to hit publish so the update never got reviewed that's my bad ð
I will keep looking on my end, but I donât see an update in the App Store and I still canât read it
Wow, those are some actually awesome ideas! Would a friend streak mean making accounts?
But yes I'm very open to ideas!

Many ideas, right now I'm close to finishing adding dark mode for the app, so it doesn't hurt peoples eyes to read at night hahaha, then there's a few things I can choose to work on like highlighting/saving verses, friend streaks, profiles, making levels actually mean something, etc.
Update to the new version and let me know if it's working for you now
Hey forgot to let you know, I got an update out yesterday that should fix that issue you were having
Hello! I was just wondering what you had planned for the app in the future. Does it work how you always want it to or is there more features to come? And are you open to ideas?
I look forward to it!
and unfortunately Apple usually takes a day to approve updates so the fix won't be out until tomorrow
It's some text scaling issues I have that I didn't fix fully so I'll get that fixed rn asap
okok thank you so much for that recording
I just had a friend try, and they were also fine until chapter 15
I have an IPhone SE and here is the recording. When I get to the lesson and nothing happens I am scrolling up and down.
Oh and what type of phone do you have?
Could you send me a screen recording of what you're seeing so I can see if I can re-create the issue?
Hey! I'm taking a look at this right now

I have deleted and reinstalled the app as well as closed and reopened it. I am at a loss and would appreciate a quick response please!
Yes I just got that fixed recently it'll be in the next update

Hello! I learned about your app from a friend who was play testing it for android and I have loved it so far! I did notice however that when I am getting quizzed after each reading whenever there is an apostrophe it puts a question mark instead, so I'm not sure what that is but I love the app overall.
